testcase.name: test_update_periods_per_day
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_school_settings.py:125: in test_update_periods_per_day assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["query","periods"],"msg":"Field required","input":null,"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_breaks
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_school_settings.py:154: in test_update_breaks assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"list_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"breaks":[{"id":"break-1","name":"استراحة الفطور","start":"09:30","end":"09:45"}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_teacher_availability
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_school_settings.py:242: in test_update_teacher_availability assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","teacher_id"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"teacher_availability":{"teacher-1":{"sunday":["1","2","3"],"monday":["1","2","3","4"]}}},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_update_constraints
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_school_settings.py:263: in test_update_constraints assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed: {"detail":[{"type":"list_type","loc":["body"],"msg":"Input should be a valid list","input":{"constraints":[{"id":"constraint-1","type":"no_first_period","teacher_id":"teacher-1","description":"لا يبدأ الحصة الأولى"}]},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/list_type"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
